Hello {{ vendor.brand_name }},

Update on Your Product Submission

Thank you for submitting "{{ product.name }}" for review.

Following our editorial guidelines, we are currently unable to approve this piece for live publication. We strive to maintain a specific aesthetic and quality standard throughout the platform.

If you have any questions regarding our curation criteria or wish to re-submit with modifications, please refer to our vendor guidelines or contact support.

Review Submissions

Best regards,
ComraidShops Curation Team
